Essays

  • Becoming the First External Contributor to an "OpenAPI for CLIs": An AI-Assisted Open Source PracticeJuly 24, 2026

    I stumbled onto CLI Schema, an open spec almost nobody has heard of — an 'OpenAPI for command-line programs.' This essay covers three things: what it is, how I used AI to contribute to its development, and what I learned about working with a maintainer who is rarely online.

In dialogue with the world, through depth · evening out the future, a little
